name: Vitello Tonnato on Pasta
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Veal loin or leg roast
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE ONION, GARLIC and 1 tablespoon oil in a 2-quart pot.
2. Place over medium heat and cook, stirring, for 5 minutes.
3. Add veal, tuna, 6 anchovies, wine, broth, thyme, bay leaves, and pepper.
4. Cover and reduce heat to low; cook for 45 to 50 minutes or until a meat thermometer measures 135°F.
5. Remove the pot from the heat and let cool to room temperature.
6. Meanwhile, cook 1/2 pound dry pasta according to package directions.
7. Drain, toss with 1 tablespoon oil, and cool.
8. Remove veal from the cooking liquid; boil liquid for 5 minutes or until reduced by half.
9. Transfer contents of the pot to a bowl and let cool.
10. Remove bay leaves; transfer to a food processor.
11. Add yolks and blend until smooth.
12. Continue blending, adding the remaining 1/2 cup oil in a slow steady stream.
13. When ready to serve dinner, toss pasta with capers, parsley, and half of the sauce.
14. Arrange slices of veal on top of the pasta.
15. Spoon remaining sauce as a ribbon over the veal.
16. Decorate with criss-crosses of anchovies.
